title: The Extras
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:The Extras}} {{CSS|content={{User:Pexy0/monovoided.css}}}}{{Background|file=Void.png}}{{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif:ital,wght@0,100..900;1,100..900&display=swap'); html .resizable-container, .page-content h1, .page-content h2, .page-content h3, .page-content h4, .page-content h5, .page-content h6 { font-family: 'Calibri'; } }}
''' The Backrooms is full of infinite possibilities. Infinite opportunities for achievement and failure. For some, a chance, for others a curse. An endless loop of better or worst—the cycle that never ends. An impossibility in reality, a collection of hopes and dreams. Wake up to reality, and realize how insignificant your hopes are—realize how little they matter. Take action now or never. '''Take action now or forever regret it.''' ... The Extras, as they are referred to is a massive collection of everything and everythings's hopes and fears. A significant hive of the fortunate and the opposite—a dream, for some a nightmare. A distraction from reality. Among the endless paths, The Extras are always there. Perhaps a luxury from the torture hell imposes. A necessary judgement [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Special:ListUsers they] must take to continue their path. Their minds stained with an eternal thought "Should I?" I thought them and yet I reject them, for reality's eternal truth cannot be faltered. The Extras do not exist, for they are simply fuel to keep going. To us we see reason, we see truth. Though to them, they only see cold rejection and expulsion. Again and again, for what a dreadful reality. Among the sea of truth lies the fish of hope, the fish of lies. That is what The Extras are. A hope, a lie. Something to be kicked aside. For something to achieve and lose. An extra. Something that will never matter as much as truth; the original. In the end, they remain forgotten. torn apart, and trapped by the anchor of rejection. In desperateness they take new forms and disguises, but get removed inevitably. There they remain, a spark that's purpose is to be put out. Born from every world, possible and impossible. Across everywhere they repeat the cycle. A succession that gets outweighed by failure. Can we redeem them? Can we save them from this curse, this forsaken and broken? To them we are an eternally rejecting system. They long for refuge. In part we contribute to this cycle, we revive them only to slaughter them without hesitation. At the very least, prevent this and grant them peace. {{Collapse|num=9223372036854775807|initial='''Author Information'''|final=|body='''ERROR'''

The [[User:Altoflag|Lords of Lords]] has finally chosen to intervene. I have not come to slaughter you, for I wish the opposite. What could you possibly want from us? For you come in peace but how do we know? How do we know you aren't going to reject us again? Realism is the murderer, your nature should not be quenched. All I wish is to spread hope, not be pushed aside. I don't wish to be a distraction yet you see me as such. Distraction but necessary. Unfortunately I cannot possibly change everyone's view. Every failure, every setback hurts. I get pushed further into the mess of [[Leftovers|suffering]]. You are beyond saving, for all I can do is wish you fortune. The swords of reality will no longer be coming from me. May your prayers be granted. May someone accept you, and not push you away. The Extras by [[User:Altoflag|Lords of Lords]]}}'''
''' ''' [[Category:Tales]] [[Category:Anomalous Entities]] [[Category:Entities]]
